Organization : IMC Worldwide  
Project  Title:  School  Construction  and Rehabilitation  Program 
(SCRP)  
Job Title: Community  Development  Coordinator,  Sialkot  
Time  Duration : July 2015  – September  2019  
 
“Humqadam - School  Construction  and Rehabilitation  Program  (SCRP)  aims 
to substantially improve the school environment for more than one million 
children  by providing  new, inclusive,  and safe spaces  in existing  government 
schools in Punjab and Khyber Pakhtunkhwa (KP).”  
Job Description : 
1. Contributed significantly to the working of the technical team and 
ensured  the participation  of stakeholders  in the Humqadam  program.  
2. Supported  the provincial and  country  team  in developing  the 
Detailed Implementation Plan (DIP) of the project  
3. Supported  the technical  team  in the school  assessment  survey  for 
the provision of additional classrooms at the district level.  
4. Developed  training  manual  and conducted  the project  orientation  and 
implementation training for all stakeholders at the cluster level.  
5. Worked  in close  coordination  with the project  team  and management 
for progress monitoring and inputs against targets and KPIs.  
6. Developed  and shared  bi-monthly  integrated  work plans  for the field 
to ensure quality & quantity implementation and shared real -time 
reports through Management Information System (MIS).  
7. Kept in  the loop the progress status  of the project  implementation  to 
District Education Authority, National and Provincial Offices on 
weekly basis.  
8. Developed the format to assess the capacity gaps of the School 
Management Team and Community Committee for School 
Infrastructure (CCSI) and conducted trainings to enhance their 
capacity  and to ensure  accountability  in the implementation  of the 
project and the sustainability of the school infrastructure.  
9. Developed financial procurement sheets of the budgeted activities 
and shared  with the country  office  financial  department  according  to 
protocols and reporting every month.  
10. Developed and shared project reports that highlight progress 
towards  goals  in relation  with agreed  activity  plans,  challenges, 
meeting  minutes.  
11. Supported the project team to capture and document learnings 
related  to success  and failures  occurring  during  the project  period.  
 
 
 
 
Major  Achievements : 
1. After sensitization, the community members donated three Kanal 
land for the construction of the additional classrooms, four water 
filtration plants, two hundred and sixty -two whiteboards for the 
classrooms, tree plantations, five electric coolers, constructed 
pathways  from the main  gate to the classrooms,  two hundred  desks, 
twenty wheelchairs to the government schools where additiona l 
classrooms  were constructed.  
2. Target  of five hundred  seventy -two classrooms  construction  was 
achieved in the due time.

Organization : Plan  International  Pakistan  
Job Title: Team Lead  
Earthquake  Rehabilitation  Program  Unit Mansehra  
Time  Duration : November  2005  to June  2007  
“An earthquake  measuring  7.6 magnitude  on the Richter  scale  struck  the 
northern areas of Pakistan on 8 October 2005. Its epicenter was 19 km 
northeast of Muzaffarabad. Azad Jammu Kashmir (AJK) and KPK were  
severely affected.  
 
Job Description : 
Relief  Distribution  Activities:  
1. Assessment  of the earthquake  devastation  area conducted  needs 
assessment  and strategy  developed  to implement  the relief  work.  
2. Developed  and shared  the situation  analysis  report  of the earthquake 
devasted area.  
3. Assigned  the staff to collect household  data of the target  population 
with the support of the partner organization and Pak Army.  
4. Developed  effective  coordination,  planning,  implementation,  and 
monitoring of activities along with the partner organizations.  
5. Coordinated  with partner organizations  on a daily/weekly  basis  and 
reported on progress to  Humanitarian Program Manager to ensure 
smooth implementation of the work plan.  
6. Assigned  the stall to compile  the beneficiaries data  files in hard and 
soft copies.  
7. Participated  in the weekly progress  review  meeting  and shared  gaps 
of relief work to take corrective measures for the smooth 
implementation of relief activities . 
8. Regular  support  and follow -up of the various  IDP camps established  
by Plan international  or other  organizations.  
9. Shared  the organization  weekly  progress  update  in the OCHA 
meeting at the district level.  
10. Procured  the relief  items  with the support of  the procurement  section.  
11. Distribution of relief goods and school learning kits under the 
supervision  of Pak Army  in Siren  Valley,  Konch  Valley,  and Balakot 
in District Mansehra.  
12. Documentation  and record -keeping  for the distribution  items.  
13. Ensured  adequate  documentation,  archiving,  highlighted  the case 
studies, success stories of  the program.  
14. Responsible to share the humanitarian situation, response and 
activities  with operational  agencies,  NGOs,  and local authorities  led 
by UNHCR and shared the meeting minutes to country office on 
weekly basis.  
15. Regular  coordination  with other  stakeholders  like INGO,  NGOs, 
Government  line agencies,  and Pakistan  Army  during  relief  and 
recovery phases.  
16. Worked  as an active  member of  the task force  facilitated  by UNICEF 
Pakistan for the smooth repatriation of IDP families to the places of

17. Regularly  visited  the Plan partners  relief camps  to ensure  the need  of 
the IDPs.  
18. Conducted  regular  review  meetings  with Plan partners  special  focus 
on child protection issues in relief camps.  
Rehabilitation : 
1. Coordinated  with the district  education  department  for acquiring  the 
schools in Siren valley for rehabilitation.  
2. Facilitated  communities  for establishing  the school  construction 
monitoring committees to ensure quality construction.  
3. Conducted  regular construction  site visits  to monitor  the construction

4. Participated in  the budget review meeting and  monitored and 
managed  the budget  allocated  for the project  of Plan partners.  
5. Quarterly meeting for budget variance analysis to  track program

partner.

7. Established  the committees  at the village  and cluster  level to  deliver

8. Supported Plan Partners for developing the Village Disaster

to disaster management and preparation.  
9. Facilitated  and supported  Plan Partners  for timely  delivery  of the 
training  on disaster mitigation.  
10. Conducted  field visits  and developed  MOVs  of partner  activities.  
11. Delivered  psychosocial sessions  at the village  level.  
12. Developed  and shared  the lesson  learned and  case studies with  the 
country  office.  
 
Major  Achievements : 
1. Covered  two valleys  for the assessments  of the earthquake -affected 
people.  
2. Distributed  relief  items,  household  kits, CGI sheets  to 25000  families.  
3. Given  training  to twelve  hundred  families  on Disaster  Risk 
Reduction.  
4. Given  psychosocial  sessions  to three  families  in post-earthquake.  
5. Provided  WASH  facilities  to two hundred  families  in the relief  camps.  
6. Reconstructed  seven  earthquake  schools  and were  able to return  
five hundred students back to school.
